text.title: API Monitoring — Alerting Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply API Monitoring — Alerting end-to-end. Each step has named input, action, and output. Decision gates reference rules from `01-core-rules.xml`.

step.name: define-slo
step.action: Write the SLO doc (target %, window e.g. 99.9%/30d, error budget). PM/ops sign-off required.

step.name: derive-burn-rate-rules
step.action: Generate multi-window burn-rate alert rules (1h+6h fast, 1d+3d slow). Page rule: 2% budget in 1h AND 5% in 6h. Ticket rule: 10% in 3d AND 10% in 1d.

step.name: annotate-with-runbook-url
step.action: Every rule has severity label + runbook_url annotation + for: ≥2m. CI lint blocks commits missing these (r2).

step.name: route-by-severity
step.action: Route page-severity to on-call; ticket-severity to issue tracker (r4). Verify routing via test alert.

step.name: validate-and-deploy
step.action: Run `promtool check rules` + `scripts/validate-api-monitoring-alerting.py --self-test`; deploy via GitOps.

section.title: Decision gates
section.p: Between steps, consult `content/06-decision-tree.xml` if the observed signal does not match expected output. The decision tree always terminates at a rule id from `01-core-rules.xml` or at `skip-this-methodology`.
